summary: []: Rewatched the first five episodes, a "new pilot" t             Quote Post by JP » Thu Jul 19, 2007 9:37 pm Now, I think that the popular vote by new pilot, everyone usually either thinks they're refering to Kaworu, or Mana (even if that opinion is just for fun). But when I rewatched the Hedgehog Dilema episode earlier tonight, something caught my eye that hadn't before: Kensuke:Hmm, Misato-san. How I envy you.

chunks.content:
Article: Rewatched the first five episodes a new pilot t
[]: Rewatched the first five episodes, a "new pilot" t             Quote Post by JP » Thu Jul 19, 2007 9:37 pm Now, I think that the popular vote by new pilot, everyone usually either thinks they're refering to Kaworu, or Mana (even if that opinion is just for fun). But when I rewatched the Hedgehog Dilema episode earlier tonight, something caught my eye that hadn't before: Kensuke:Hmm, Misato-san. How I envy you. You live with such a beautiful lady and can pilot Evangelion. Oh, I could pilot it to my heart's content just for once. Shinji: You'd not better do it. I think your mother would be worried about it. Kensuke:Ah, it's O.K. I don't have a mother. I'm the same as you. Shinji: Yes. Even I think Aida as a pilot is slim, but imagine if he was the new pilot? He would probably die off real quick lol. Hell, Toji was a pilot sorta . Toji can be his replacement.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Thu Jul 19, 2007 9:39 pm Please, if Kensuke was a pilot I would shoot myself. He is annoying enough as it is.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Jul 19, 2007 9:41 pm Fearthebait wrote: Please, if Kensuke was a pilot I would shoot myself. He is annoying enough as it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 19, 2007 9:48 pm I always liked the Irony of Kensuke NOT getting able to pilot, case in point, see the GoS2 game/manga. Plus, he was WAAY too self-centered to see how bad it is (Kensuke, episode 19: "Damn! Even Touji gets to pilot, but I--" Me: " Touji's in the hospital! I know this is meant to show you're screwed up like the rest of the Eva cast, but come on!")

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Jul 19, 2007 10:01 pm Only psycho's can pilot the EVA; so ergo, no Kensuke. Same goes for Hikari actually,

Article: Rewatched the first five episodes a new pilot t
[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Jul 19, 2007 10:01 pm Only psycho's can pilot the EVA; so ergo, no Kensuke. Same goes for Hikari actually, although I'd be more open to that option. You can never have too much Hikari ya know.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Jul 19, 2007 10:33 pm yeah. but what if they made aida i pilot, and he immediately had some horrific experience and it shattered his world. His fascination with all things that explode goes bye-bye. Then, he's stuck being a miserable pilot. Hey, that sounds depressing enough to make it into wevangewion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 20, 2007 1:01 am I second (or third) the notion of Hikari becoming a Pilot before Kensuke ever could. She and Touji could make out in the entry plug that way! And Slothen: I like the way you think. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Fri Jul 20, 2007 1:13 am All of Shinji's classmates could be pilots, if Ritsuko is to be believed: Misato (OFF): Dr. Akagi, aren't you hiding something from me again? RITSUKO (OFF): Not really. Misato: Well, okay. So, who's the selected kid? Of all the people, it's that child? RITSUKO (OFF): It can't be helped. All the candidates were gathered together for protection.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 20, 2007 3:23 am I kept hoping and praying the new pilot would've actually been a pilot in Japan before Shinji. And what happens is Shinji's brought in to be the third of their Pilots and when Sachiel attacks the New Pilot is sent out in an Eva to do battle. And Shinji watches as this kid is brutally killed by Sachiel, I mean Eva limbs ripped off, the chest ripped open and big squishy Evsa organs flopping all over the place, Sachiel acting like a mosnter and ripping the Eva's skull open and digging in the body to find the entry plug to squash it.

Article: Rewatched the first five episodes a new pilot t
 off, the chest ripped open and big squishy Evsa organs flopping all over the place, Sachiel acting like a mosnter and ripping the Eva's skull open and digging in the body to find the entry plug to squash it. And there's this young boy screaming in pain over the entire thing. And then crush- SILENCE. Hold on everyone doing a "Oh shit" expression. Shinji in shock, and then Misato or Ritsuko turns to Shinji and coldly says: "Get inside the Eva". Maybe its because I'm a sick son of a bitch but thats what Iwould've loved ot have seen happen. But now my best guess is the New Pilot is a young hottie with glasses and a lisp (an anime stereotype Eva has yet to cover)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 26, 2007 1:11 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: <Almost a summary of the early chapters of the manga>

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:48 pm Shin-seiki wrote: I thought she was piloting Unit-01...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 6:04 pm What Shin-Seiki and Tokpile Quohog said: Rei's injuries in the manga are from battling the 3rd Angel inside Shogoki for God knows what reason. Oh yeah, and that idea of Gendou'sPapa would be pretty sweet, but sadly probably won't happen. (I'm assuming by "guts ripping out" you mean an EoE-style Eva death?) Best left for a kick-ass fanfic, I assume? *glances at Smith's direction* But now my best guess is the New Pilot is a young hottie with glasses and a lisp (an anime stereotype Eva has yet to cover)

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Thu Jul 26, 2007 6:17 pm I always saw Kensuke as a character that had a lot of potential but never developed. I liked the side of him that came out every once in awhile where he was wise to things that the others were in the dark about. Perhaps if he was matured a bit and they dropped some of his childish antics and gave him more depth he could actually be a suitable pilot. Perhaps as things progress and he sees the "dark side" of the EVA's he actually becomes more interested in it and becomes addicted to it and slowly loses his sanity in the process. Somewhat the opposite of Asuka; perhaps the mixture of aggressive and suppressive results from

Article: Rewatched the first five episodes a new pilot t
 sees the "dark side" of the EVA's he actually becomes more interested in it and becomes addicted to it and slowly loses his sanity in the process. Somewhat the opposite of Asuka; perhaps the mixture of aggressive and suppressive results from piloting the EVAs would work.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 26, 2007 6:31 pm So, where do they say there's going to be a new pilot in Webuild?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 7:06 pm The first trailer, the words in English: "New Story, New Pilot, New Machine." (Though its possible it did say "New character" and I'm remembering wrong.)

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Jul 26, 2007 7:11 pm Perhaps they're just referring to Kaworu. If there's an all new character, I hope it's a he.
